title: stock-one-pager output
description: Beginner-friendly single-name snapshot. Plain-language fields for the retail read, plus a `components` block that surfaces raw sub-skill readings for callers who want to layer more on top.

trend_plain.description: Plain-language trend read (e.g. 'in a fragile uptrend', 'range-bound').

recent_range_position.description: Plain-language read on where price sits in its recent range vs Bollinger bands.

liquidity_plain.description: Plain-language liquidity read from the ADV bucket.

next_catalyst.description: Next known catalyst (earnings-based today; extensible to news / regulatory events later).

market_context_plain.description: Plain-language macro-regime read. Null when include_market_context=False.

what_could_go_wrong.description: Short list of honest risks based on the actual readings, not boilerplate.

components.description: Compact snapshot of the underlying sub-skill readings for callers who want the raw signals.
